attributes.action: Dirt jumps and mountain bike trails in Glyneath
attributes.additional_details: The UK Government should invest in mountain bike trails and jump parks for young people. These facilities encourage exercise, improve mental health, and provide a safe outdoor activity. Purpose-built trails reduce the risks associated with unofficial jumps and riding in unsuitable areas. They also help build confidence, develop skills and create positive community spaces Investing in these facilities would support healthier lifestyles and give young people constructive recreational opportunities
attributes.background: Invest in mountain bike jumps and trails in Glyneath to create a new community and to allow kids to outdoors and to stop them doing alcohol and drugs

rejection.details: What happens at Glyneath is a local issue and doesn't fall under the responsibility of the UK Government.
